ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: VEGETABLES (75%) (Broccoli, Carrot, Cabbage, Bok Choy, Snow Pea or Snap Pea, Kale) PAD THAI SAUCE (25%) (Water, Sugar, GF Soya Sauce, Fish Sauce, Rice Vinegar, Food Acid (260, 330), Sunflower Seeds, Thickener (1442, 415), Canola Oil, Salt, Citrus Fibre, Onion, Preservative (202)).
